rationale: The citation appears as introductory background to support a broad claim that online chatter is spontaneous, information-rich, granular, and live. The citing paper does not use the cited paper's LDA-based text-mining framework, valence extraction procedure, or strategic brand-mapping outputs in its hypotheses or estimation. Instead, it relies on third-party sentiment coding and VAR/PVAR analyses of recall spillovers, so the cited work has no distinct functional role beyond context-setting.
